sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_column VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column) VALUES (1, '    test  ');
UPDATE test_table SET text_column = trim(text_column) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, text_column, trim(text_column) AS trimmed_text FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE trim(text_column) = 'test';
